rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE contracts
Structure branching logic with nested if-then-else expressions in AGREE
generic_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts are either visible AADL features or locally declared helpers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
End AGREE annex blocks with proper closing syntax
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE guarantees
Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee placement
